description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Linux build that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Use a matrix job on ubuntu-latest to test with Python 3.7, 3.8, and 3.9. For each Python version, check out the repository, set up Python, install torch and dependencies from requirements.txt, and run unit tests with environment variables HEREMAPS_API_KEY, PLANET_API_KEY, and EARTHENGINE_TOKEN from secrets.
